pr.title: Rename grstadium to grpstadium for asserts and clean them up, permuter match a function
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Renamed the Pokémon Stadium ground translation unit from grstadium to grpstadium in splits/config/includes so assert filenames can use the real source file name, then cleaned several raw __assert blocks into HSD_ASSERT and renamed TextWrapper fields from offsets to role names. The bot report shows the unit rename as many grstadium broken matches paired with grpstadium new matches, plus a small net matched-code increase and several grpstadium function improvements.

key_files.role: Renamed main source file from src/melee/gr/grstadium.c and carried most functional cleanup: include rename, __FILE__ use in OSReport, HSD_ASSERT conversions, TextWrapper field renames, and matching-oriented edits.
evidence_refs: changed_files: src/melee/gr/grpstadium.c added 133 deleted 174 hunks 26

diff: removed todo saying file needs to be named grpstadium.c for asserts
diff: #include "grstadium.h" changed to #include "grpstadium.h"

what_changed.text: Renamed the stadium ground source path and corresponding build/split references from grstadium to grpstadium.
evidence_refs: diff: rename from src/melee/gr/grstadium.c to src/melee/gr/grpstadium.c

what_changed.text: Updated dependent includes in ftPr_SpecialHi.c, gm_16AE.c, and ground.c to include grpstadium.h instead of grstadium.h.
evidence_refs: diff: include changes in ftPr_SpecialHi.c, gm_16AE.c, ground.c

what_changed.text: Converted multiple raw __assert("grpstadium.c", line, expr) blocks into HSD_ASSERT(line, expr).
evidence_refs: diff: fn_801D2ED0 HSD_ASSERT(0x6D2, vision_gobj) and HSD_ASSERT(0x6D3, gp2)

diff: grStadium_801D3460 HSD_ASSERT(0x780, gp2->win_static_p) and HSD_ASSERT(0x781, gp2->win_dynamic_p)

what_changed.text: Changed one OSReport call to pass __FILE__ instead of a hardcoded "grpstadium.c" string.
evidence_refs: diff: OSReport format retained, "grpstadium.c" replaced by __FILE__ in grStadium_801D10F8

what_changed.text: Renamed TextWrapper fields x18 and x1C to win_static_p and win_dynamic_p and updated many callsites.
evidence_refs: diff: typedef struct TextWrapper fields x18/x1C renamed to win_static_p/win_dynamic_p
diff: HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC assigned to win_static_p and HSD_SisLib_803A6754 assigned to win_dynamic_p

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded +0.01% matched code, +408 bytes, 74 new matches under main/melee/gr/grpstadium, and corresponding grstadium broken matches from the unit rename.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] Report for GALE01 matched code 55.56% (+0.01%, +408 bytes)
text_corpus: 74 new matches under main/melee/gr/grpstadium
text_corpus: 73 broken matches under main/melee/gr/grstadium

smart_moves.text: The PR handled the file rename across split metadata, build configuration, and dependent includes in one change, reducing stale path references.
evidence_refs: diff: splits.txt, configure.py, ftPr_SpecialHi.c, gm_16AE.c, ground.c all changed from grstadium to grpstadium

smart_moves.text: After aligning the source filename with the assert filename, the diff could replace raw assert expansions with HSD_ASSERT without keeping hardcoded file strings.
evidence_refs: diff: removed todo about needing grpstadium.c for asserts
diff: repeated __assert("grpstadium.c", ...) blocks replaced with HSD_ASSERT(...)

smart_moves.text: The TextWrapper field names document callsite roles: win_static_p is used for HSD_SisLib_803A6368 static/window setup, while win_dynamic_p is cleared, positioned, colored, and receives formatted text.
evidence_refs: diff: TextWrapper field rename
diff: win_static_p assigned HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC and passed to HSD_SisLib_803A6368
diff: win_dynamic_p assigned HSD_SisLib_803A6754 and used for pos_z, text_color, default_kerning, HSD_SisLib_803A6B98

decomp_lessons.lesson: When raw assert expansions embed the intended source filename, first check whether the translation unit path/name is wrong; fixing the TU name can make HSD_ASSERT cleanup natural instead of preserving hardcoded filename strings.
evidence_refs: diff: removed todo saying grstadium.c needs to be named grpstadium.c for asserts
diff: rename to src/melee/gr/grpstadium.c
diff: raw __assert("grpstadium.c", line, expr) blocks converted to HSD_ASSERT(line, expr)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Semantic local struct field names are justified when repeated assignments and callsites show stable roles; here x18/x1C became win_static_p/win_dynamic_p based on distinct SIS library creation and use patterns.
evidence_refs: diff: HSD_SisLib_803A5ACC assigned to win_static_p
diff: HSD_SisLib_803A6754 assigned to win_dynamic_p
diff: many x18/x1C callsites updated to win_static_p/win_dynamic_p

decomp_lessons.lesson: A TU rename can make progress reports look like many broken matches in the old unit and many new matches in the new unit; compare unit names before interpreting broken/new match counts as real regressions.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: 74 new matches under main/melee/gr/grpstadium
text_corpus: 73 broken matches under main/melee/gr/grstadium
text_corpus: net matched code +0.01%, +408 bytes

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 report showed matched code 55.56% (+0.01%, +408 bytes), 74 new matches under main/melee/gr/grpstadium, 73 broken matches under main/melee/gr/grstadium, 10 improvements in unmatched items, and 11 regressions in unmatched items largely corresponding to the old unit name.

notes: PR body is empty and there are no human review comments in the loaded slice.
The raw diff is truncated, so only visible edits are described in detail.

The bot report provides validation-like progress numbers, but many broken/new entries are explained by the unit rename and should not be interpreted as independent function regressions without further objdiff context.

The title says 'permuter match a function', and the diff shows matching-oriented artifacts, but the loaded evidence does not identify which source edits came from the permuter or why each tactic was necessary.

source_update_candidates.reason: Path fact candidate because the PR is explicitly a source/build path rename and downstream includes were updated.

source_update_candidates.title: Check TU filename before assert macro cleanup
source_update_candidates.text: Possible refinement to assert cleanup guidance: when raw assert expansions use a filename that differs from the current translation-unit path, inspect whether the source file should be renamed or split metadata corrected before replacing raw asserts with HSD_ASSERT/HSD_ASSERTMSG.
evidence_refs: diff: todo says file needs to be named grpstadium.c for asserts
diff: PR renames file and then uses HSD_ASSERT
diff: OSReport uses __FILE__ after rename
source_update_candidates.reason: The current standards cover assert macro cleanup and TU split evidence separately; this PR provides a concrete example linking assert filename evidence to source path correction.

rejection_notes: Do not promote the empty if ((jobj->flags && jobj->flags)) pattern as an accepted tactic from this slice alone; it is visible in the diff but not explained by comments or validation details.
Do not claim all 73 broken matches are harmless solely from this slice; the report suggests rename-related churn, but detailed adjacent objdiff evidence is not loaded.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human reviews or review comments are present.
